hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs prepare and preserve structured evidence across multiple jurisdictions by connecting regulatory rules, provider outputs, and case workflows into one audit-ready compliance layer.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to compile consistent, traceable evidence when operating under multiple jurisdictional requirements. Disconnected workflows and varied regulatory policies increase the risk of incomplete audit records and slow cross-border reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes jurisdiction-specific provider outputs, regulatory updates, cases and evidence into a unified workflow that supports consistent audit-ready records across cross-border compliance operations for VASPs.
workflow_title: From regulatory update to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY tracks jurisdictional regulatory changes and maps them to internal policies while preserving case evidence for multi-jurisdictional audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multi-jurisdiction provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and evidence to support clear audit preparation across complex cross-border compliance requirements.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs preparing multi-jurisdictional audit evidence by connecting provider outputs and operational controls into a governed, enterprise-grade compliance layer.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help prepare audit-ready cross-border evidence
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows support multi-jurisdiction audits
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence links provider outputs and policies
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for secure cross-border compliance
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for cross-border compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer to connect jurisdiction-specific rules, policies and Travel Rule workflows for VASPs operating across borders and regulatory frameworks.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage multi-jurisdiction cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures multi-jurisdiction case workflows by connecting regulatory rules, provider outputs and internal decisions into traceable cases for consistent cross-border compliance management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed evidence packages, decision logs and case histories to support audit readiness and defensible review across diverse regulatory jurisdictions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into a single operational workflow without replacing those systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above these providers, organizing their outputs into structured reviews, cases and reports while maintaining existing tool investments.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready evidence for cross-border compliance
final_description: Review how SFTY structures multi-jurisdiction workflows, connects provider outputs and preserves evidence for VASP audit readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
